nasb.text: They taught in Judah, having the book of the law of the Lord with them; and they went throughout all the cities of Judah and taught among the people.

esv.text: And they taught in Judah, having the Book of the Law of the Lord with them. They went about through all the cities of Judah and taught among the people.

cnv.text: 他們帶著耶和華的律法書，在猶大教訓人；他們走遍猶大各城，在民間教訓人。

ccb.text: 他们带着耶和华的律法书，走遍犹大各城镇教导民众。
